metadata._llmHint: This file contains epic metadata and lightweight storyRefs. Full story content is at: stories/{storyId}.json (relative to this file). Do NOT add full story objects to this file — they belong in standalone story files.

content.title: Focus Mode & Productivity
content.goal: Create a distraction-free work environment that helps engineers achieve flow state by intelligently managing notifications, task visibility, and focus time tracking.
content.valueDelivered: Engineers report 40% fewer context switches. Teams see 25% sprint velocity improvement. Focus time data helps managers protect deep work hours.

upstream.reason: Focus Mode needs task filtering API and notification infrastructure from Core Platform
Focus Mode uses AI priority scores to determine which tasks to show in focus queue

downstream.reason: Slack integration syncs DND status with Focus Mode

breakdown.description: Focus state machine, notification interceptor, session events
Minimal focus UI, timer, daily/weekly charts
Rule engine, admin UI, priority classifier

implementationNotes: Pomodoro timer with configurable work/break intervals (default 25/5 minutes)
Notification batching uses a priority queue — P0 breaks through, P1-P3 are batched
Focus analytics stored in TimescaleDB for efficient time-series queries
Team-wide notification rules configurable by Engineering Managers
content.acceptanceSummary: Epic is complete when focus mode activates/deactivates reliably, notification batching works with priority override, analytics show accurate time tracking, and the focus UI passes accessibility audit.

functional.criterion: Focus mode activates within 500ms of clicking Start Focus
Notification batching correctly queues P1-P3 and passes P0

nonFunctional.criterion: Focus UI scores 95+ on Lighthouse accessibility audit

security.criterion: Focus session data is only visible to the user and their direct manager

risks.risk: Engineers may ignore focus mode if P0 breakthrough is too aggressive
risks.impactDescription: If P0 alerts are too frequent or false-positive, engineers will stop using focus mode entirely
risks.mitigation: Strict P0 classification criteria and user-configurable threshold

mitigationStrategies.strategy: Allow users to configure their own breakthrough threshold (P0-only, P0+P1, or all)
Track P0 frequency and alert if it exceeds 2 per day average

risks.contingencyPlan: Add a 'DND Hard Mode' that blocks ALL notifications including P0
triggers: Focus mode adoption drops below 30% after initial launch spike
User feedback mentions too many interruptions during focus

items.item: Focus mode can be activated/deactivated reliably
Notification batching works correctly with priority override
Focus analytics show accurate time tracking
Accessibility audit passed for focus UI
